# Chapter 2: Number representations, arithmetic, precision  (~80 pp)
- 2.1 Integer representations (12) · 2.2 IEEE 754 floating-point (15) · 2.3 Fixed-point arithmetic (10) · 2.4 Numerical precision in practice (15) · 2.5 Reproducibility of floating-point computation (12) · 2.6 Failure section: Patriot missile clock drift, Ariane 5 conversion, Pentium FDIV (16)
